# DCSS
*July 29, 2026*

---

## Docker Commands

```bash
docker build . < Dockerfile -t Portimage

docker build -t portimageweb

docker tag portimageweb Username/reponame

docker image

docker push image -a username/reponame

docker run -d -p 8080:80 -name websitename portimageweb
```

---
